summary: Validated P0 video thumbnail fix and P1 ThankYou modal. Backend: 8/8 pytest pass (upload video -> has_thumb becomes True in ~1s, /api/media/thumb serves valid JPEG (FFD8FF), /api/media/preview serves JPEG, video_status transitions to 'ready' with web_ready=true, {stem}.web.mp4 present on disk, no .web.tmp.mp4 leftover, photo upload regression OK, share favourite+submit endpoint OK). Frontend: gallery landing renders 5 album cards, album masonry grid loads 6 tiles, heart toggle updates header favourite count, Submit for Album shows thank-you-modal with 'Thank You!', tenant brand ('Demo Studio') referenced, Close button dismisses modal, Download All triggers Eva_&_Ella_27.06.26.zip download.
critical_code_review_comments: media.transcode_web: the `finally` block deletes tmp unconditionally at the end of each loop iteration, but after a successful `tmp.rename(dst)` the tmp path no longer exists so `tmp.exists()` is False — safe. Just noting so future refactors keep the rename-before-return ordering.

media.video_poster writes the intermediate frame beside the source (`src.parent / .{stem}.frame.jpg`). If two videos with identical stems in different subfolders processed concurrently, this is fine (different parents). But note ffmpeg subprocess runs are NOT check=True so silent failures rely on file-size check — acceptable given the fallback.

public_share.media_thumb/preview: for videos it returns 404 with detail 'Poster not ready' if the cache jpg is missing — could confuse UI showing 'video is uploading' state. Frontend already gates on has_thumb so OK today, but worth documenting.

galleries.upload_files reads full file bytes (await uf.read()) into memory before writing to disk — for the 500MB video use-case this will OOM under concurrent uploads. Recommend streaming via shutil.copyfileobj on uf.file. (Also flagged in iter 12.)
test_credentials: Tenant admin demo@studio-app.uk / Demo!2026 via POST /api/admin/login (returns {token}). Public share /s/eva-ella-27-06-26.
seed_data_creation: One temporary gallery TEST_Video_iter13 with one 3s testsrc mp4 + one solid-colour jpg, deleted in fixture teardown (delete_backup=true). Favourite toggle for share was un-toggled at end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video thumbnail pipeline verified end-to-end (upload -> has_thumb True in ~1s -> JPEG served). CPU transcode of a 3s test clip completes in <5s so the ready-state assertion polls up to 120s but usually returns immediately. If a longer/more realistic clip is needed, extend deadline. Note the demo share currently has 4 favourites from prior test sessions across sessionIds — cosmetic; the ThankYou message text uses the live count.
rca of the issue: No regressions. The P0 fix (output-seek + fallback + temp-then-rename) works as intended. The P1 ThankYou modal renders with correct data-testids and dismisses cleanly.
